---
title: "Montserrat Marti"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
---

I am a first-year PhD student in Economics at Brown University. My research interests are in applied and labor economics, with an empirical focus on the use of microdata for causal analysis.
